implementation_summary: _validate_distro() in config.py raises ConfigValidationError with FR5 multi-line migration message when distro == 'alpine'.
Config.vm_distro dataclass default changed from 'alpine' to 'ubuntu'; from_wizard() fallback and _validate_distro(None) also changed to 'ubuntu'.
docs/migration-from-alpine.md created with AI-agent-readable migration steps.
TestAlpineConfigRejection class (5 tests) added to tests/test_config.py.

Category A: test_version_check.py fixtures changed from distro: alpine to ubuntu; all get_vm_distro mock returns changed to 'ubuntu' to avoid spurious distro-mismatch prompts; test_distro_change::test_distro_change_not_checked_if_no_metadata switched to ubuntu_config_yaml fixture.
Category B: 14 tests marked @pytest.mark.skip with explicit story-deletion references (Story 02, 03, 04, 05).

deviations_from_spec.deviation: Config.vm_distro dataclass default changed from 'alpine' to 'ubuntu' in Story 01
deviations_from_spec.reason: The existing default of 'alpine' caused any default-constructed Config to write distro: alpine on save, triggering the new FR5 guard on reload. Changing the default is a necessary consequence of the guard; the field is removed entirely in Story 03.

deviations_from_spec.deviation: Test fixtures updated in Story 01 (Category A: vm_distro='alpine' -> 'ubuntu')
deviations_from_spec.reason: The Alpine config rejection guard broke tests that used alpine as an incidental fixture value not testing Alpine behavior. Per team-lead: fixture updates belong in Story 01.
deviations_from_spec.impact: No test assertions changed — same behavior, different incidental fixture value.

deviations_from_spec.deviation: 14 Category B tests marked @pytest.mark.skip in Story 01
deviations_from_spec.reason: Tests directly asserting Alpine code paths cannot pass once the guard is in place. They are scheduled for deletion in Stories 02-05. Explicit skip is preferred over xfail to avoid masking future regressions.
deviations_from_spec.impact: 14 skipped tests with explicit story-deletion references. No assertions loosened.

test_counts.skipped_note: All 14 skips are Category B Alpine-behavior tests marked for deletion in Stories 02-05.

verification_rounds.reason: 31 test failures (alpine-fixture tests). Team-lead reversed acceptance — zero-tolerance test gate.

verification_rounds.changes: Fixed all 31 failures: Category A fixture updates, Category B skip markers. Test gate is now green: 1042 passed, 14 skipped, 0 failed.
